channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Kentucky bank robbery leaves 2 employees dead, suspect in custody
item.description: Two bank employees were fatally shot during a robbery in Kentucky Thursday. Police have apprehended a person of interest.

item.title: Amtrak Considers Relaxing Gun Rules, Reports Indicate
item.description: Sources report Amtrak is considering changes to its gun policies. Concerns have been raised regarding potential security implications.

item.title: Trump Nominates Radiologist for Surgeon General
item.description: President Trump has announced his nomination of Dr. Nicole Saphier to serve as the nation's surgeon general.

item.title: NYPD Officers Praised After Home Explosion
item.description: Seven officers are recovering after rescuing residents, including children, from a house following an explosion during a domestic incident.
